overall.description: A stationary or slow-moving view from a cable car traveling through dense mountain fog. A metal support tower is visible on the left while the background consists of obscured forest silhouettes barely visible through the thick mist. The footage captures the atmospheric conditions of a foggy day in a mountainous region with extremely limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain forest viewed from cable car

agents.ego_description: traveling slowly through dense fog in a cable car with extremely limited visibility of the surrounding mountain terrain

entered.detail: metal lattice tower with vertical cable lines, partially obscured by heavy fog
dark silhouettes of coniferous trees barely visible through dense white mist
shadowy tree outlines fading into the foggy background

segments.scene_description: The video presents a continuous, atmospheric view from a cable car moving through extremely dense mountain fog. A metal support tower remains stationary on the left side of the frame while the background consists of barely discernible dark forest silhouettes shrouded in thick white mist. The scene maintains a static, ethereal quality throughout with no significant changes in visibility or composition.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric perspective from a cable car gliding through a dense and unchanging mountain fog. It begins with a view of thick white mist that heavily obscures the surrounding landscape, leaving only the faint, dark silhouettes of a forest visible in the distance. As the camera moves forward, a metal support tower remains a constant anchor on the left side of the frame against the void of the clouds. The scene persists in this ethereal state, with the limited visibility and muted tones remaining consistent as the cable car drifts through the shroud.
